tasks.label: Showcase: Dependencies Up
tasks.command: set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a && docker compose --profile deps up -d

tasks.label: Showcase: Dependencies Down
tasks.command: set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a && docker compose --profile deps down

tasks.label: Showcase: Dev Stack Up
tasks.command: set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a && docker compose --profile dev up -d --build

tasks.label: Showcase: Dev Stack Down
tasks.command: set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a && docker compose --profile dev down

tasks.label: Showcase: Prod Stack Up
tasks.command: set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a && docker compose --profile prod up -d --build

tasks.label: Showcase: Prod Stack Down
tasks.command: set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a && docker compose --profile prod down

tasks.label: Showcase: Logs (deps)
tasks.command: set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a && docker compose --profile deps logs -f

tasks.label: Showcase: Run API (host)
tasks.command: set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a && [ -f scripts/env-go.sh ] && source scripts/env-go.sh; cd service && go run ./cmd/api

tasks.label: Showcase: Run Web (host)
tasks.command: set -a && [ -f .env ] && source .env; set +a && cd webapp && npm run dev
